title: Consumer detriment survey 2024: additional analysis
body: "This report by the CMA’s Microeconomics Unit builds on the consumer detriment survey 2024 with additional analysis of detriment by consumer group and purchase channel. It also explores the relationship between inflation and detriment.  This report will be most relevant to:   the UK government enforcement bodies consumer groups researchers   Source of ONS material: Consumer price inflation item indices and price quotes "
